suite.name: suite S1779640087709 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_SAUCE_001 Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Open Main Page
Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens the Sauce Demo application

kw.name: User Logs In With Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters username in login field

kw.name: Enter Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters password in login field

kw.name: Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the login button
User logs in with valid username and password

kw.name: User Is Successfully Authenticated
Verify Products Page Displayed
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Verifies that the products container is visible
Verifies user is authenticated and on products page

kw.name: Close Main Page
kw.doc: Closes the browser

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: User logs in with valid credentials and is redirected to products page

test.name: TC_SAUCE_002 Add Product To Cart

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Open Main Page
Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens the Sauce Demo application

kw.name: User Logs In With Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters username in login field

kw.name: Enter Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters password in login field

kw.name: Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the login button
User logs in with valid username and password

kw.name: User Adds Product To Cart By Name
Add Product To Cart
Get WebElement
kw.msg: Element with locator 'xpath=//div[contains(text(), 'Sauce Labs Backpack')]/ancestor::div[@class='inventory_item']//button[contains(text(), 'Add to cart')]' not found.
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//div[contains(text(), 'Sauce Labs Backpack')]/ancestor::div[@class='inventory_item']//button[contains(text(), 'Add to cart')]' not found.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Adds a specific product to cart
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//div[contains(text(), 'Sauce Labs Backpack')]/ancestor::div[@class='inventory_item']//button[contains(text(), 'Add to cart')]' not found.

kw.doc: User adds a specific product to cart
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//div[contains(text(), 'Sauce Labs Backpack')]/ancestor::div[@class='inventory_item']//button[contains(text(), 'Add to cart')]' not found.

kw.name: Product Is Added To Cart Successfully
kw.doc: Verifies product was added successfully with correct quantity

kw.name: Close Main Page
kw.doc: Closes the browser

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: User adds a product to cart and verifies it appears with correct quantity
test.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) Element with locator 'xpath=//div[contains(text(), 'Sauce Labs Backpack')]/ancestor::div[@class='inventory_item']//button[contains(text(), 'Add to cart')]' not found.
2) User keyword cannot be empty.

test.name: TC_SAUCE_003 Sort Products By Price Ascending

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Open Main Page
Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens the Sauce Demo application

kw.name: User Logs In With Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters username in login field

kw.name: Enter Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters password in login field

kw.name: Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the login button
User logs in with valid username and password

kw.name: User Sorts Products By Price Ascending
Select Sort Option
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'class:product_sort_container' by value value:price-asc.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.
Selects sorting option from dropdown
User selects price ascending sort option

kw.name: Products Are Displayed In Ascending Price Order
kw.doc: Verifies products are sorted from lowest to highest price

kw.name: Close Main Page
kw.doc: Closes the browser

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: User sorts products by price in ascending order
test.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) List with locator 'class:product_sort_container' not found.
2) User keyword cannot be empty.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Test Cases for Sauce Demo application
